title: JobLens
description: A full-stack job application platform I designed and built end-to-end. Python/FastAPI backend with a PostgreSQL database and a vanilla JavaScript frontend. Built deliberately without frameworks on the frontend so I understand and can defend every layer of the stack.

title: Streakser
description: A habit streak-tracking iPhone app built with Expo and React Native. Supports per-habit scheduling, streak-freeze logic, haptic feedback, and offline persistence via AsyncStorage.

title: Speech-to-Text Benchmark
description: A personal dictation tool and benchmarking harness comparing local (mlx-whisper) and API-based (GPT-4o-transcribe) speech-to-text models on accented English, measuring accuracy and latency trade-offs.

title: NeighbourHeat
description: Team hackathon project from the Edinburgh AI × Anthropic Hackathon (2026): a platform for analysing thermal drone imagery to identify residential heat loss. I served as DevOps/backend lead on a three-person team.
